name: Austin Chamber of Commerce
notes: Primary regional chamber supporting economic development, business advocacy, and regional initiatives like Opportunity Austin.
map_location: Downtown Austin near 5th Street / Congress area

name: Greater Austin Asian Chamber of Commerce
focus_type: Affinity (Asian Pacific American business community, Central Texas)
notes: Advocates for, connects, and educates the Asian Pacific American business community in Central Texas through advocacy, connections, and education.
map_location: Northeast Austin near US 290 and US 183

name: Greater Austin Hispanic Chamber of Commerce
notes: Trusted advocate and resource for the Hispanic business community in Greater Austin, focused on economic development, networking, and policy advocacy.
map_location: North Central Austin near Highland / St. John

name: Greater Austin Black Chamber of Commerce
focus_type: Affinity (Black-owned businesses and Black community, Austin)
notes: Supports and mobilizes Black businesses in Austin, offering networking, business resources, and community-focused economic development.

name: Austin LGBT Chamber of Commerce
focus_type: Affinity (LGBTQ+ and allied businesses, Central Texas)
notes: Central Texas hub for LGBTQ+ and allied businesses; focuses on marketing, education, community development, and events like Pride in Local Music.
map_location: Downtown Austin near 5th Street / Congress area

name: West Austin Chamber of Commerce
notes: Represents and advocates for businesses in the West Austin corridor (including ZIPs 78726, 78730, 78732, 78750, 78759), focusing on networking, education, and policy issues impacting West Austin.
map_location: Northwest Austin along FM 620 near Lake Travis

name: Lake Travis Chamber of Commerce
street_address: 14425 Falcon Head Blvd, Building E, Suite 100
notes: Serves the greater Lake Travis area (Bee Cave, Lakeway, The Hills, Spicewood, etc.), promoting business growth and quality of life around Lake Travis.
map_location: Far West Austin / Lake Travis area near Bee Cave and Lakeway

name: Westlake Chamber of Commerce
focus_type: Geographic (Westlake / West Lake Hills / Rollingwood area)
notes: Nonprofit business membership organization promoting, connecting, and engaging businesses in the Westlake, West Lake Hills, and Rollingwood area.
map_location: Westlake / West Lake Hills just west of MoPac and Colorado River

name: Austin Young Chamber
focus_type: Affinity (young professionals and employers, Greater Austin)
notes: 501(c)(6) chamber for young professionals, focused on leadership development, civic engagement, and networking for members generally ages 21–40.

name: Buda Area Chamber of Commerce
notes: Supports local businesses in Buda with networking, referrals, and advocacy; partners with the City of Buda and Buda EDC on recruitment and retention.
map_location: South of Austin in Buda / northern Hays County

name: Pflugerville Chamber of Commerce
notes: Local chamber for the Pflugerville area, now serving as the city’s official Convention and Visitors Bureau and providing business support and promotion.
map_location: Northeast of Austin in Pflugerville / Travis–Williamson County line

name: Round Rock Chamber of Commerce
notes: Economic development-focused chamber for Round Rock, leading business recruitment, expansion, and advocacy in northern Austin metro.
map_location: North of Austin in downtown Round Rock
